name: Phishing Triage
description: PLACEHOLDER kit per plan §9.3. The intended scope is: Mail.app message metadata + Safari history + recent downloads + iMessage URL collection. Each requires its own collector plugin that hasn't been built yet. This entry documents the intent so operators can subscribe early; the kit becomes useful once at least three of the four collector plugins ship.

plugins.role: Stand-in until real triage plugins land — provides a hostname baseline for phishing URL detection
